name: Final Checklist — Last 2 Weeks Before D-Day

hook.what_you_will_build: Final Checklist — Last 2 Weeks Before D-Day

key_takeaways: Week 1 plan: 3 timed coding problems/day + 1 system design/day + behavioral practice
Week 2 plan: 2 full mock rounds/day + company-specific research + STAR story polish
Day before: light review only, prepare 3 questions to ask interviewer, test tech setup
Day of: warm up with 2 easy problems, review pattern cheat sheet, join 5 min early
Post-interview: document questions asked within 1 hour while memory is fresh
Job offer: compare equity, growth, tech stack, team — not just salary
reflection.next_topic_preview: THE COURSE IS COMPLETE! Congratulations on finishing all 46 modules.
